creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fixed in r444819[0] by doing the (a bit more elaborate) upgrade to 20170630.
I didn't take your suggestion to make pygments a run time dependency, as this would pull in a lot more packages than necessary. I added a reference to it in pkg-message though, so those who want better syntax highlighting have a hint what to do.

Thanks for your help.

[0]https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=444819
